metadata.description: Deploys the AZ AIOps Dashboard workbook to Azure Monitor.
metadata.author: krishna-sunkavalli

metadata.description: Display name for the Azure Workbook
Source ID for the workbook (use 'Azure Monitor' for standalone)
Resource tags to apply to the workbook

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# AZ AIOps Dashboard
### Single Pane of Glass — Azure AI & Cognitive Services

Monitors `Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts` and `Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/projects` (Azure AI Foundry). Select your scope below to begin.

---"},"name":"header"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"p-subscription","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"Subscription","type":6,"isRequired":false,"multiSelect":true,"value":["value::all"],"typeSettings":{"additionalResourceOptions":["value::all"],"includeAll":true},"label":"Subscription"},{"id":"p-resourcegroup","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"ResourceGroup","type":2,"isRequired":false,"multiSelect":true,"query":"Resources

High-level health and request volume across all selected Azure AI / Cognitive Services resources."},"name":"overview-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let aoaiTotal = toscalar(AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider =~ 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES'
| where MetricName == 'AzureOpenAIRequests'
| summarize sum(Total));
let modelsTotal = toscalar(AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider =~ 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES'
| where MetricName == 'ModelRequests'
| summarize sum(Total));
print Category = 'Azure OpenAI', Total = coalesce(aoaiTotal, 0.0)
| union (print Category = 'Models API', Total = coalesce(modelsTotal, 0.0) - coalesce(aoaiTotal, 0.0))
| where Total > 0","size":3,"noDataMessage":"No request data in the selected time range.","title":"Request Volume by API Type","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{LogAnalyticsWorkspace}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","visualization":"piechart"},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"LogAnalyticsWorkspace","comparison":"isNotEqualTo","value":""},"customWidth":"40","name":"kpi-requests-piechart"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts'
| project location, ResourceName = name, Kind = tostring(kind), ResourceGroup = resourceGroup

Requests by Model Name","showOpenInMetricsExplorer":true},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-model-requests-model"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts'
| extend ResourceId = tolower(id)
| join kind=leftouter (
    Resources
    | where type =~ 'microsoft.insights/diagnosticsettings'
    | extend parentId = tolower(tostring(split(id, '/providers/microsoft.insights/diagnosticsettings/')[0]))
    | summarize DiagCount = count() by parentId
) on $left.ResourceId == $right.parentId
| extend DiagnosticSettings = iff(isnotnull(DiagCount), 'Configured', 'Not Configured')
| project ResourceName = name, ResourceGroup = resourceGroup, Kind = tostring(kind), SKU = tostring(sku.name), Location = location, PublicAccess = tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess), ProvisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState), DiagnosticSettings
| order by ResourceName asc","size":0,"title":"Cognitive Services Resource Inventory","queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resources/subscriptions","crossComponentResources":["{Subscription}"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ProvisioningState","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Succeeded","representation":"green","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"yellow","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"PublicAccess","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Enabled","representation":"red","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"green","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"DiagnosticSettings","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Configured","representation":"green","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"red","text":"{0}{1}"}]}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"ResourceName","sortOrder":1}]}},"name":"table-resource-inventory"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"tab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"overview"},"name":"group-overview"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Token Usage

Latency
All values in milliseconds. **TTR** = Time to Response (first byte, streaming). **TTFB** = Normalized Time to First Byte (per token). **TBT** = Time Between Tokens. **TTLB** = Time to Last Byte.

> For PTU deployments, correlate `NormalizedTimeToFirstToken` with PTU Utilization V2. Rising TTFB at high utilization indicates saturation."},"name":"latency-header"},{"type":10,"content":{"version":"MetricsItem/2.0","size":0,"chartType":2,"resourceType":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts","metricScope":0,"resourceIds":["{CogServicesResource}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","metrics":[{"namespace":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts","metric":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts--AzureOpenAITimeToResponse","aggregation":4,"splitBy":"ModelDeploymentName"},{"namespace":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts","metric":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts--AzureOpenAITimeToResponse","aggregation":3,"splitBy":"ModelDeploymentName"}],"title":"Time PTU Utilization

> **Note:** These metrics apply to **PTU** and **PTU-Managed** deployments only. Pay-as-you-go deployments will show no data.

> **Deprecation:** `AzureOpenAIProvisionedManagedUtilization` (v1) is deprecated. This workbook uses `AzureOpenAIProvisionedManagedUtilizationV2` exclusively. When utilization reaches 100%, requests are throttled with HTTP 429.

> **Tip:** Monitor `IsSpillover = true` requests to understand how often traffic is exceeding PTU capacity and overflowing to the spillover pool."},"name":"ptu-header"},{"type":10,"content":{"version":"MetricsItem/2.0","size":0,"chartType":2,"resourceType":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts","metricScope":0,"resourceIds":["{CogServicesResource}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","metrics":[{"namespace":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts","metric":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts--AzureOpenAIProvisionedManagedUtilizationV2","aggregation":4,"splitBy":"ModelDeploymentName"},{"namespace":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts","metric":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts--AzureOpenAIProvisionedManagedUtilizationV2","aggregation":3,"splitBy":"ModelDeploymentName"}],"title":"PTU Utilization V2 (%) — Max + Avg by Monitors Azure OpenAI content filtering and Responsible AI telemetry. Split by `Category` and `Severity` dimensions for incident investigation."},"name":"safety-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureMetrics
| where MetricName in ('RAITotalRequests','RAIHarmfulRequests','RAIRejectedRequests','RAIAbusiveUsersCount')
| summarize Total = sum(Total) by MetricName
| project Category = case(MetricName == 'RAITotalRequests', 'Total Volume', MetricName == 'RAIHarmfulRequests', 'Harmful Volume', MetricName == 'RAIRejectedRequests', 'Blocked Volume', MetricName == 'RAIAbusiveUsersCount', 'Abusive Users', MetricName), Total","size":3,"noDataMessage":"No Content Safety events detected in the selected time range.","title":"Content Safety Volume","showOpenInMetricsExplorer":true},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-content-safety-moderation"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"tab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"safety"},"name":"group-safety"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## AI Agents — Azure AI Foundry Projects

> **Preview:** AI Agents metrics are sourced from `Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/projects`. These metrics are currently in Preview and are **not exportable** via Diagnostic Settings.

Foundry Project resources are **auto-derived** from the parent Cognitive Services accounts selected above — no additional resource picker is required.

> If no data appears, ensure your Azure AI Foundry Project resources exist under the selected Cognitive Services accounts and that agent workloads have been executed within the selected time range."},"name":"agents-header"},{"type":10,"content":{"version":"MetricsItem/2.0","size":0,"chartType":3,"resourceType":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metricScope":0,"resourceIds":["{FoundryProjectResources}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","metrics":[{"namespace":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metric":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects--AgentRuns","aggregation":1,"splitBy":"RunStatus"}],"title":"Agent Runs by Status","showOpenInMetricsExplorer":true},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-agent-runs-status"},{"type":10,"content":{"version":"MetricsItem/2.0","size":0,"chartType":3,"resourceType":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metricScope":0,"resourceIds":["{FoundryProjectResources}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","metrics":[{"namespace":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metric":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects--AgentResponses","aggregation":1,"splitBy":"ResponseStatus"}],"title":"Agent Responses by Response Status","showOpenInMetricsExplorer":true},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-agent-responses-status"},{"type":10,"content":{"version":"MetricsItem/2.0","size":0,"chartType":2,"resourceType":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metricScope":0,"resourceIds":["{FoundryProjectResources}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","metrics":[{"namespace":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metric":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects--AgentInputTokens","aggregation":1,"splitBy":"ModelName"},{"namespace":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metric":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects--AgentOutputTokens","aggregation":1,"splitBy":"ModelName"}],"title":"Agent Input + Output Tokens by Model","showOpenInMetricsExplorer":true},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-agent-tokens"},{"type":10,"content":{"version":"MetricsItem/2.0","size":0,"chartType":3,"resourceType":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metricScope":0,"resourceIds":["{FoundryProjectResources}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","metrics":[{"namespace":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metric":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects--AgentToolCalls","aggregation":1,"splitBy":"ToolName"}],"title":"Agent Name","showOpenInMetricsExplorer":true},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-agent-tool-calls"},{"type":10,"content":{"version":"MetricsItem/2.0","size":0,"chartType":2,"resourceType":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metricScope":0,"resourceIds":["{FoundryProjectResources}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","metrics":[{"namespace":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metric":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects--AgentThreads","aggregation":1,"splitBy":"EventType"}],"title":"Agent Threads by EventType","showOpenInMetricsExplorer":true},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-agent-threads"},{"type":10,"content":{"version":"MetricsItem/2.0","size":0,"chartType":2,"resourceType":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metricScope":0,"resourceIds":["{FoundryProjectResources}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","metrics":[{"namespace":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metric":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects--AgentMessages","aggregation":1,"splitBy":"EventType"}],"title":"Agent User Messages by EventType","showOpenInMetricsExplorer":true},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-agent-messages"},{"type":10,"content":{"version":"MetricsItem/2.0","size":0,"chartType":3,"resourceType":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metricScope":0,"resourceIds":["{FoundryProjectResources}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","metrics":[{"namespace":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metric":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects--AgentRuns","aggregation":1,"splitBy":"ModelName"}],"title":"Agent Runs by Model Name","showOpenInMetricsExplorer":true},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-agent-runs-model"},{"type":10,"content":{"version":"MetricsItem/2.0","size":0,"chartType":3,"resourceType":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metricScope":0,"resourceIds":["{FoundryProjectResources}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","metrics":[{"namespace":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects","metric":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects--AgentUsageIndexedFiles","aggregation":1,"splitBy":"Status"}],"title":"Agent Indexed Files (Vector Store) by Status — split VectorStoreId for drill-down","showOpenInMetricsExplorer":true},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-agent-indexed-files"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"tab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"agents"},"name":"group-agents"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Logs & Diagnostics
KQL-based deep diagnostics using Azure Monitor Log Analytics."},"name":"logs-header"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Log Analytics Workspace Required

This tab requires a **Log Analytics Workspace** with Diagnostic Settings configured on your Azure AI / Cognitive Services resources.

**To configure:**
1. Navigate to your Cognitive Services resource → **Diagnostic settings**
2. Add a diagnostic setting targeting your Log Analytics Workspace
3. Enable log categories: `Audit`, `RequestResponse`, `Trace`
4. Return here and select your Log Analytics Workspace in the **parameter bar above**

> 📖 [Configure Diagnostic Settings — Microsoft Docs](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/essentials/create-diagnostic-settings)"},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"LogAnalyticsWorkspace","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":""},"showInEditMode":true,"name":"logs-no-law-message"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider =~ 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES'
| where MetricName in ('AzureOpenAIRequests','ModelRequests')
| summarize Total = sum(Total) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), MetricName
| summarize AOAI = take_anyif(Total, MetricName == 'AzureOpenAIRequests'), Models = take_anyif(Total, MetricName == 'ModelRequests') by TimeGenerated
| extend ['Azure OpenAI'] = coalesce(AOAI, 0.0), ['Models API'] = coalesce(Models, 0.0) - coalesce(AOAI, 0.0)
| project TimeGenerated, ['Azure OpenAI'], ['Models API']
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Request Volume Over Time by Metric","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{LogAnalyticsWorkspace}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","visualization":"timechart"},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"LogAnalyticsWorkspace","comparison":"isNotEqualTo","value":""},"customWidth":"50","name":"kql-request-volume"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider =~ 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES'
| where MetricName in ('ProcessedPromptTokens','GeneratedTokens')
| summarize Total = sum(Total) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), MetricName
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Token Volume Over Time (Prompt + Completion)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{LogAnalyticsWorkspace}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","visualization":"timechart"},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"LogAnalyticsWorkspace","comparison":"isNotEqualTo","value":""},"customWidth":"50","name":"kql-throttled-requests"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider =~ 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES'
| where MetricName in ('AzureOpenAIAvailabilityRate','ModelAvailabilityRate')
| summarize AvgRate = avg(Average) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), MetricName, Resource
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Availability Rate Over Time (%)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{LogAnalyticsWorkspace}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","visualization":"timechart"},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"LogAnalyticsWorkspace","comparison":"isNotEqualTo","value":""},"customWidth":"50","name":"kql-latency-percentiles"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider =~ 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES'
| where MetricName in ('AzureOpenAINormalizedTTFTInMS','NormalizedTimeToFirstToken')
| extend Source = case(MetricName == 'AzureOpenAINormalizedTTFTInMS', 'Azure OpenAI', 'Models API')
| summarize AvgLatencyMs = avg(Average), MaxLatencyMs = max(Maximum) by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m), Source
| render timechart","size":0,"title":"Normalized Time to First Byte — Avg + Max (ms)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{LogAnalyticsWorkspace}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","visualization":"timechart"},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"LogAnalyticsWorkspace","comparison":"isNotEqualTo","value":""},"customWidth":"50","name":"kql-top-errors"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AzureMetrics
| where ResourceProvider =~ 'MICROSOFT.COGNITIVESERVICES'
| where MetricName == 'TokenTransaction'
| summarize TotalTokens = sum(Total) by Resource, ResourceGroup
| top 20 by TotalTokens desc","size":0,"title":"Top Resources by Token Consumption","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","crossComponentResources":["{LogAnalyticsWorkspace}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TotalTokens","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"TotalTokens","sortOrder":2}]}},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"LogAnalyticsWorkspace","comparison":"isNotEqualTo","value":""},"customWidth":"50","name":"kql-token-by-operation"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"tab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"logs"},"name":"group-logs"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Capacity
Track provisioned capacity (K TPM) and quota allocation across model deployments. Use this tab to identify deployments approaching their rate limits and plan capacity scaling.

> **Capacity** values from Azure Resource Graph represent the provisioned K TPM (thousands of tokens per minute) for each deployment. Multiply by 1,000 to get the raw TPM limit.

> **Tip:** If a deployment shows frequent HTTP 429s in the Throttled Requests chart below, consider increasing its capacity or switching to a higher-throughput SKU."},"name":"capacity-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/deployments'
| extend ParentAccount = tostring(split(id, '/')[8])
| project DeploymentName = name, ParentAccount, ResourceGroup = resourceGroup, Model = tostring(properties.model.name), ModelVersion = tostring(properties.model.version), SKU = tostring(sku.name), ['Capacity (K TPM)'] = toint(sku.capacity), ScaleType = tostring(properties.scaleSettings.scaleType), ProvisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| order by ParentAccount asc, DeploymentName asc","size":0,"title":"Deployment Capacity Summary","queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resources/subscriptions","crossComponentResources":["{Subscription}"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"Capacity (K TPM)","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}},{"columnMatch":"ProvisioningState","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Succeeded","representation":"green","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"yellow","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"SKU","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"contains","thresholdValue":"Provisioned","representation":"purple","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"contains","thresholdValue":"Global","representation":"blue","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"lightBlue","text":"{0}{1}"}]}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"$gen_bar_Capacity (K TPM)_6","sortOrder":2}]}},"name":"table-capacity-summary"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/deployments'
| project Model = tostring(properties.model.name), Capacity = toint(sku.capacity)
| summarize ['Total K TPM'] = sum(Capacity) by Model
| order by ['Total K TPM'] desc","size":0,"title":"Capacity Allocation by Model (K TPM)","queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resources/subscriptions","crossComponentResources":["{Subscription}"],"visualization":"barchart"},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-capacity-by-model"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/deployments'
| project SKU = tostring(sku.name), Capacity = toint(sku.capacity)
| summarize ['Total K TPM'] = sum(Capacity) by SKU","size":3,"title":"Capacity Allocation by SKU Type","queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resources/subscriptions","crossComponentResources":["{Subscription}"],"visualization":"piechart"},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-capacity-by-sku"},{"type":10,"content":{"version":"MetricsItem/2.0","size":0,"chartType":2,"resourceType":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts","metricScope":0,"resourceIds":["{CogServicesResource}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","metrics":[{"namespace":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts","metric":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts--TokenTransaction","aggregation":1,"splitBy":"ModelDeploymentName"}],"title":"Token Throughput by Deployment (Actual Usage)","showOpenInMetricsExplorer":true},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-capacity-token-throughput"},{"type":10,"content":{"version":"MetricsItem/2.0","size":0,"chartType":2,"resourceType":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts","metricScope":0,"resourceIds":["{CogServicesResource}"],"timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","metrics":[{"namespace":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts","metric":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts--AzureOpenAIRequests","aggregation":1,"splitBy":"ModelDeploymentName","columnName":"Total Requests"},{"namespace":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts","metric":"microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts--RatelimitedCalls","aggregation":1,"splitBy":"ModelDeploymentName","columnName":"Rate-Limited (429)"}],"title":"Throttled vs Total Requests by Deployment","showOpenInMetricsExplorer":true},"customWidth":"50","name":"chart-capacity-throttled"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/deployments'
| extend ParentAccount = tostring(split(id, '/')[8])
| project ParentAccount, DeploymentName = name, Model = tostring(properties.model.name), SKU = tostring(sku.name), ['Capacity (K TPM)'] = toint(sku.capacity)
| summarize Deployments = count(), ['Total K TPM'] = sum(['Capacity (K TPM)']) by ParentAccount
| order by ['Total K TPM'] desc","size":0,"title":"Capacity by Account (Aggregate)","queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resources/subscriptions","crossComponentResources":["{Subscription}"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"Total K TPM","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}},{"columnMatch":"Deployments","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"green"}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-capacity-by-account"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/deployments'
| project Model = tostring(properties.model.name), SKU = tostring(sku.name), ['Capacity (K TPM)'] = toint(sku.capacity), ScaleType = tostring(properties.scaleSettings.scaleType)
| summarize Deployments = count(), ['Total K TPM'] = sum(['Capacity (K TPM)']) by Model, SKU, ScaleType
| order by ['Total K TPM'] desc","size":0,"title":"Capacity by Model + SKU Breakdown","queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resources/subscriptions","crossComponentResources":["{Subscription}"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"Total K TPM","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}},{"columnMatch":"Deployments","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"green"}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-capacity-model-sku"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"tab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"capacity"},"name":"group-capacity"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## Inventory
Azure Resource Graph-driven inventory of all Cognitive Services and Azure AI resources, model deployments, private endpoints, and Diagnostic Settings posture."},"name":"inventory-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts'
| project ResourceName = name, ResourceGroup = resourceGroup, Kind = tostring(kind), SKU = tostring(sku.name), Location = location, Endpoint = tostring(properties.endpoint), CustomDomain = tostring(properties.customSubDomainName), PublicAccess = tostring(properties.publicNetworkAccess), ProvisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState), SubscriptionId = subscriptionId
| order by ResourceName asc","size":0,"title":"Cognitive Services Resources","queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resources/subscriptions","crossComponentResources":["{Subscription}"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ProvisioningState","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Succeeded","representation":"green","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"yellow","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"PublicAccess","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Enabled","representation":"red","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"green","text":"{0}{1}"}]}}],"filter":true}},"name":"table-cog-resources"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/deployments'
| project DeploymentName = name, ParentResource = tostring(split(id, '/')[8]), ResourceGroup = resourceGroup, Model = tostring(properties.model.name), Version = tostring(properties.model.version), Format = tostring(properties.model.format), SKU = tostring(sku.name), Capacity = tostring(sku.capacity), ScaleType = tostring(properties.scaleSettings.scaleType), ProvisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| order by ParentResource asc, DeploymentName asc","size":0,"title":"Model Deployments","queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resources/subscriptions","crossComponentResources":["{Subscription}"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ProvisioningState","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Succeeded","representation":"green","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"yellow","text":"{0}{1}"}]}}],"filter":true}},"name":"table-model-deployments"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.network/privateendpoints'
| mv-expand connection = properties.privateLinkServiceConnections
| where tostring(connection.properties.privateLinkServiceId) contains 'cognitiveservices'
| project PrivateEndpoint = name, ResourceGroup = resourceGroup, Location = location, LinkedResource = tostring(split(tostring(connection.properties.privateLinkServiceId), '/')[8]), ConnectionState = tostring(connection.properties.privateLinkServiceConnectionState.status)
| order by LinkedResource asc","size":0,"title":"Private Endpoints — AI / Cognitive Services","queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resources/subscriptions","crossComponentResources":["{Subscription}"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ConnectionState","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Approved","representation":"green","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"yellow","text":"{0}{1}"}]}}],"filter":true}},"name":"table-private-endpoints"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/deployments'
| project DeploymentName = name, ParentAccount = tostring(split(id, '/')[8]), ResourceGroup = resourceGroup, Model = tostring(properties.model.name), Version = tostring(properties.model.version), Format = tostring(properties.model.format), SKU = tostring(sku.name), Capacity = tostring(sku.capacity), ScaleType = tostring(properties.scaleSettings.scaleType), ProvisioningState = tostring(properties.provisioningState)
| order by ParentAccount asc, DeploymentName asc","size":0,"title":"Model Deployments — Full Detail","queryType":1,"resourceType":"microsoft.resources/subscriptions","crossComponentResources":["{Subscription}"],"visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ProvisioningState","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Succeeded","representation":"green","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"yellow","text":"{0}{1}"}]}}],"filter":true}},"name":"table-diagnostic-settings"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"tab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"inventory"},"name":"group-inventory"}],"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
